message.content:
@startuml
participant Actor as Admin
participant Actor as User
participant Interface as AccountManagement
participant Interface as Broker
participant Interface as Notifications
participant Interface as UAA
participant Interface as EmailSender

Actor Admin
Actor User

Interface AccountManagement
Interface Broker
Interface Notifications
Interface UAA
Interface EmailSender

Admin -> AccountManagement : WorkspaceInvitation
AccountManagement -> AccountManagement : save data to db
AccountManagement -> Admin : 200 response
AccountManagement -> Broker : create event "new user invited event"
Broker -> Notifications : read event
Notifications -> Notifications : with email and senderId
Notifications -> EmailSender : read info about sender
Notifications -> EmailSender : generate email
EmailSender -> Broker : create "new email event"
EmailSender -> Broker : read "new email event"
EmailSender -> Admin : send email

alt [user accepts invitation]
    AccountManagement -> AccountManagement : WorkspaceEmailValidation
    AccountManagement -> AccountManagement : check email
    AccountManagement -> Admin : WorkspaceEmailValidationResult
    alt [email valid]
        AccountManagement -> AccountManagement : generate access code
        AccountManagement -> Broker : create event "new access code"
        Broker -> Notifications : read event
        Notifications -> Notifications : with email and access code
        Notifications -> EmailSender : generate email
        EmailSender -> Broker : create "new email event"
        EmailSender -> Broker : read "new email event"
        EmailSender -> Admin : send email
    end
    alt [access code valid]
        AccountManagement -> AccountManagement : change state
        AccountManagement -> UAA : WorkspaceRegistration
        UAA -> AccountManagement : check state by email
        UAA -> Broker : create new event "user created event"
        Broker -> Notifications : read event "user created event"
        Notifications -> Notifications : create user with email
    end
end

@enduml
